notes: Built from turn36 bundled model pack + HYM_HAMT2.0_CAN DB_R13_260206.xlsx + 202603_8-can.duckdb (can0). Rules include only stable/validated periodic IDs from the provided real log. Optional or mode-dependent IDs remain messages-only to avoid false 미수신 timing alarms. | rev2: added dedicated real-log revalidation for 0x401/0x503/0x2D0/0x600/0x705

signals.name: Collision detection sensor state (front)
signals.operating_text: 0- Off / 1 - On ** 1 - On 신호 시 reset 시까지 On 유지

signals.name: Collision detection sensor state (rear)
signals.operating_text: 0- Off / 1 - On ** 1 - On 신호 시 reset 시까지 On 유지

signals.name: Collision detection sensor state (left)
signals.operating_text: 0- Off / 1 - On ** 1 - On 신호 시 reset 시까지 On 유지

signals.name: Collision detection sensor state (right)
signals.operating_text: 0- Off / 1 - On ** 1 - On 신호 시 reset 시까지 On 유지

signals.name: LH1 Motor Encoder
signals.description: Little-endian uint16 from bytes 2-3 (validated in real log)

signals.name: LH2 Motor Encoder
signals.description: Little-endian uint16 from bytes 4-5 (validated in real log)

signals.name: RH1 Motor Encoder
signals.description: Little-endian uint16 from bytes 2-3 (validated in real log)

signals.name: RH2 Motor Encoder
signals.description: Little-endian uint16 from bytes 4-5 (validated in real log)

signals.name: LH1 Steering Angle
signals.description: Little-endian int16 from bytes 2-3; validated with real CAN log

signals.name: LH2 Steering Angle
signals.description: Little-endian int16 from bytes 4-5; validated with real CAN log

signals.name: RH1 Steering Angle
signals.description: Little-endian int16 from bytes 2-3; validated with real CAN log

signals.name: RH2 Steering Angle
signals.description: Little-endian int16 from bytes 4-5; validated with real CAN log

signals.name: Fault number High Byte
signals.description: High byte of wireless charger fault code. Real log shows 0x0407 => 1031

signals.name: Fault number Low Byte
signals.description: Low byte of wireless charger fault code. Pair with high byte for big-endian code

signals.name: Warning number
signals.description: Observed always 0 in provided real log

signals.name: Observed constant
signals.description: Observed constant 0x50 in provided real log

signals.name: Charger state
signals.description: Observed 0 and 3 in provided real log

signals.name: CHARGER STATUS
signals.operating_text: 0: 미사용, 1: 충전대기, 2: 충전중, 3: 충전완료, 4: 보상충전중, 5: 충전에러, 6: 충전경고, 7~15: 미사용

signals.name: CHARGING STATE DISPLAY (For CLUSTER)
signals.description: 충전표시등

signals.name: Output voltage Low Byte
signals.description: Pair with Output voltage High Byte

signals.name: Output voltage High Byte
signals.description: Pair with Output voltage Low Byte

signals.name: Output current
signals.description: Not observed in provided can0 log

signals.name: Internal temperature Low Byte
signals.description: Pair with Internal temperature High Byte

signals.name: Internal temperature High Byte
signals.description: Pair with Internal temperature Low Byte

signals.name: Charging Mode
signals.operating_text: 0 : Current Mode 1 : Voltage Mode 충전시 항상 Voltage Mode로 동작할 것

signals.name: charge_EN
signals.description: Only bit0 used; provided real log is always 0

signals.name: Discharge FET ON
signals.description: 사전 차단 정보 참조용

signals.name: Charge FET ON
signals.description: 사전 차단 정보 참조용

signals.name: Average Cell Temperature
signals.description: Validated with real log (~22.4 to 22.7 C)

signals.name: Minimum Cell Temperature
signals.description: Workbook omitted resolution; real log indicates 0.1 C scale

signals.name: Maximum Cell Temperature
signals.description: Workbook omitted resolution; real log indicates 0.1 C scale

signals.name: Difference Cell Temperature
signals.description: Workbook omitted resolution; real log indicates 0.1 C scale

signals.name: H/W version
signals.description: Little-endian uint16 from bytes 1-2. Real log fixed at 1000

signals.name: S/W version
signals.description: Little-endian uint16 from bytes 3-4. Real log fixed at 1000

signals.name: Input Voltage
signals.description: Real log observed about 0.8 to 25.5 V

signals.name: Temperature
signals.description: Real log observed about 1.1 to 25.5 C

signals.name: Observed byte1
signals.description: Real-log reverse validation did not confirm workbook channel mapping. Keep as raw byte for objective display. 1st percentile~99th percentile: 17~208

signals.name: Observed byte2
signals.description: Real-log reverse validation did not confirm workbook channel mapping. 1st percentile~99th percentile: 1~251

signals.name: Observed byte3
signals.description: Real-log reverse validation did not confirm workbook channel mapping. 1st percentile~99th percentile: 27~225

signals.name: Observed byte4
signals.description: Real-log reverse validation did not confirm workbook channel mapping. 1st percentile~99th percentile: 0~253

signals.name: Observed byte5
signals.description: Real-log reverse validation did not confirm workbook channel mapping. 1st percentile~99th percentile: 4~250

signals.name: Observed byte7
signals.description: Byte6 is constant 0x00 in provided real log. Byte7 varies widely; keep raw. 1st percentile~99th percentile: 7~248

signals.name: Observed byte8
signals.description: Byte8 varies widely; keep raw until channel mapping is validated. 1st percentile~99th percentile: 5~249

signals.name: 12V 1CH Current
signals.description: Validated from real log: byte2 is current (e.g. 0x54 => 8.4 A); previous 16-bit mapping gave impossible 2150.4

signals.name: 12V 2CH Current
signals.description: Validated from real log: byte3 is current (e.g. 0x27 => 3.9 A)

signals.name: 24V 1CH Current
signals.description: Validated from real log: byte5 is current (e.g. 0xF8 => 24.8 A)

signals.name: Warn code
signals.description: Warn/diagnostic code from workbook; not fully validated in provided log

signals.name: Error code
signals.operating_text: 0: 에러없음, 1: FAULT - ADCU CAN COMM. 2: FAULT - BATTERY PACK CAN COMM. 3: FAULT - VCU CAN COMM. 4: FAULT - DCDC CONVERTER CAN COMM. 5~ 미사용

signals.name: Warn code
signals.operating_text: 0: WARNING - NORMAL STATE 1: WARNING - CHARGER CAN COMM. 2~ 미사용

signals.name: Source
signals.operating_text: 0: remote controller, 1: ADCU manual, 2: ADCU autonomous
signals.description: Real log fixed at raw 2 (ADCU autonomous) in provided capture

signals.name: Collision avoidance TTC
signals.operating_text: 0: off, 1~7: TTC sec for maximum speed cap
signals.description: Real log fixed at raw 0 in provided capture

signals.name: Velocity
signals.description: Bytes2-3 little-endian signed. All-zero in provided capture

signals.name: Steering
signals.description: Bytes4-5 little-endian signed. All-zero in provided capture

signals.name: Driving mode
signals.operating_text: 0: emergency stop, 1: motion hold, 2: front steering, 3: front steering opposite, 4: four-wheel steering, 5: four-wheel steering opposite, 6: crab mode, 7: spin mode
signals.description: Real log byte6 was only 0x20/0x40. Reverse validation maps upper 3 bits to decoded values 1/2

signals.name: Alive counter
signals.description: All-zero in provided capture

signals.name: CRC
signals.description: All-zero in provided capture

signals.name: LED index begin
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 시작 (시작 index 가 끝보다 큰 경우 시작 index LED 에서 마지막 LED까지)

signals.name: LED index end
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 끝 (끝 index가 시작 index보다 작은 경우 0번째 LED 에서 끝 index LED까지)

signals.name: LED index begin
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 시작 (시작 index 가 끝보다 큰 경우 시작 index LED 에서 마지막 LED까지)

signals.name: LED index end
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 끝 (끝 index가 시작 index보다 작은 경우 0번째 LED 에서 끝 index LED까지)

signals.name: LED index begin
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 시작 (시작 index 가 끝보다 큰 경우 시작 index LED 에서 마지막 LED까지)

signals.name: LED index end
signals.description: 제어 대상 LED 끝 (끝 index가 시작 index보다 작은 경우 0번째 LED 에서 끝 index LED까지)

signals.name: Motor mode
signals.operating_text: Observed mainly 1 and 2 in provided log

signals.name: Motor RPM
signals.description: Little-endian int16; validated against real log. Unsigned interpretation produced impossible ~65535 wrap values

signals.description: Little-endian int16; validated against real log, fits physical steering range

signals.name: Hart beat State
signals.description: Workbook says byte2 bit8. Provided real log shows byte2 always 0x80 when alive

signals.name: Alive counter (LSB)
signals.description: Workbook specifies bytes3-6 as uint32 big-endian. Current turn36 decoder is little-endian contiguous only, so model pack exposes LSB byte for objective monitoring; raw bytes3-6 still visible in frame/detail

signals.name: H/W version
signals.description: Little-endian uint16 from bytes 1-2

signals.name: S/W version
signals.description: Little-endian uint16 from bytes 3-4

signals.name: Error code
signals.description: Diagnostic/error code from workbook

signals.name: Warn code
signals.operating_text: 0: WARNING - NORMAL STATE 1: WARNING - DATA RATE ( 01 )

signals.name: Error code
signals.operating_text: 0: FAULT - NORMAL STATE 1: FAULT - DATA RECIVE ERROR ( 01 )

signals.name: Alive counter
signals.description: Alive_Counter_Byte3~6, uint32 big-endian (Byte3=MSB) (1000ms 주기마다 1씩 증가,)

signals.name: Observed word34 raw
signals.description: Dedicated reverse validation merged bytes3-4. Real log range 0x01F6..0x0205 (502..517) at ~50 ms

signals.name: State flag
signals.description: Observed 0x01 on 3409/3410 frames in provided real log. Project history indicates 0x800 -> 0x600 migration for KPCU-type status

signals.name: Reserved byte2
signals.description: Kept for visibility only

signals.name: Reserved byte3
signals.description: Kept for visibility only

signals.name: Signature byte3
signals.description: Stable signature byte

signals.name: Signature byte4
signals.description: Stable signature byte

signals.name: Tail byte5
signals.description: One of four repeating tail patterns in provided real log

signals.name: Tail byte6
signals.description: One of four repeating tail patterns in provided real log

signals.description: One of four repeating tail patterns in provided real log

signals.description: One of four repeating tail patterns in provided real log
